fields.label: Eyebrow
fields.name: compare_table_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Small overline above the heading, e.g. "Compare".

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: compare_table_heading
fields.instructions: Section title, e.g. "How we stack up".

fields.label: Columns
fields.name: compare_table_columns
fields.instructions: Table column headers, left to right. Flag the STECH column to highlight it in both the header and body cells.

sub_fields.label: Highlight (STECH)
sub_fields.name: compare_table_columns_highlight
sub_fields.instructions: Highlight this column as the STECH column.

fields.label: Rows
fields.name: compare_table_rows
fields.instructions: Table body rows. Add one cell per column, in the same order.

sub_fields.label: Cells
sub_fields.name: compare_table_rows_cells
sub_fields.instructions: One cell per column, left to right.

sub_fields.label: Emphasise
sub_fields.name: compare_table_rows_cells_is_yes
sub_fields.instructions: Style this cell as a positive/"yes" value.

fields.label: Footnote
fields.name: compare_table_footnote
fields.instructions: Small note shown below the table, e.g. a source or disclaimer.
